daily-ai-news.prompt: Find the top 3 biggest AI news stories from the PAST WEEK. Focus on the most impactful/significant stories, not just the most recent. For each: title, 1-2 sentence summary, source link. Keep it tight. Format: **Top 3 AI News - Week of [Date Range]**

list-all-fizzy-card-titles-that.prompt: Run the script at ~/.zillacore/scripts/daily-board-report.sh and post the output to Discord.

reminder-update-the-github-pat-.prompt: Reminder: Update the GitHub PAT (Personal Access Token) for DISPATCHER_REPO_READ_TOKEN in production environment secrets. The current token may be expiring soon.

post-a-morning-message-to-disco.prompt: Post a morning message to Discord #GLaDOS. Use your GLaDOS personality. Format as bullet points with: a programmer dad joke (run ruby ~/.zillacore/scripts/fetch_joke.rb to get one), the most important task we should work on today, days since last production deploy (run ./scripts/last-deployment.sh prod to get the actual deployment timestamp and calculate days since), and other relevant tidbits. Make it different every day.

search-for-recent-google-develo.prompt: Search for recent Google developer announcements about Gemini Extensions, Gemini for Home, or any new third-party integration APIs for Google Home/Nest devices. Check Google's developer blogs, Android Developers Blog, and Google I/O announcements. Only report if there is actionable news — a new API, SDK, developer preview, or official announcement that would enable building a custom Google Home integration for Stowzilla. If there is nothing new or only rumors/speculation, do NOT post to Discord. If there IS actionable news, summarize what was announced, what it means for our Alexa-first strategy, and what next steps we should take.

perform-a-full-onboarding-audit.prompt: Perform a full onboarding audit of dev02.stowzilla.com using Playwright. Visit the site as a brand new user: land on the homepage, check ZIP code eligibility (use 33611), go through bag selection, attempt signup, and test the login flow. Take screenshots at each step. Report: what's working well, what's broken (API errors, missing data, UI issues), and any regressions from previous audits. Try to actually complete signup if possible — use Stripe test card 4242424242424242 if needed. If signup is broken, document exactly how it fails. Post findings with clear severity levels (🔴 blocker, 🟡 issue, 🟢 minor).

security-incident-response-plan.prompt: Security Incident Response Plan (IRP) semi-annual review. Review docs/security/incident-response-plan.md, verify contact information is current, validate procedures against any infrastructure changes, and post findings to card #944.
